calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-24-2016 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-19-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840

Jill Bates-Moore, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, NATIONAL COLLEGIATE STUDENT LOAN TRUST 2007-3, A DELAWARE STATUTORY TRUST(S),
No appearance by defaulted defendant KEVIN ROSS,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.
Court finds good cause and Granted Waiver of Witness Requirement on Hearing for Default Prove-up and to proceed by declaration.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:
Damages: $26,448.93
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $671.30
Total Judgment in the amount of $27,120.23

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-22-2016 Continued To Jul-13-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
